# ASApps Games

> An independent iOS game studio publishing five free puzzle and card games for iPhone and iPad — all with no pop-up ads and no required in-app purchases. The games are free, supported by a small unobtrusive banner plus optional short ads the player can choose to watch (for example, to continue after a few mistakes or to get a hint). No full-screen ad ever interrupts gameplay uninvited. Every title works fully offline.

## Games

- [Sudoku No Pop-up Ads](https://asappsgames.com/sudoku/): Free classic Sudoku for iPhone and iPad. Six difficulty levels (Beginner, Easy, Medium, Hard, Expert, Master), smart hints, fast notes, unlimited undo. No pop-up ads. Rated 4.7 stars from ~8,000 reviews. App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/sudoku-no-pop-up-ads/id1624437334
- [Color Blocks - Block Match](https://asappsgames.com/color-blocks/): Free color-matching block puzzle for iPhone and iPad. Drag and drop multi-color blocks, match three or more of the same color to clear, unlock new colors as you score. No pop-up ads. Rated 4.7 stars. App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/color-blocks-block-match/id1476903896
- [Block Blast Puzzle Jewel](https://asappsgames.com/blocks/): Free classic block puzzle for iPhone and iPad. Drag and drop blocks to fill rows and columns, score combo bonuses, earn daily rewards, customize the board. No pop-up ads. Rated 4.8 stars. App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/block-blast-puzzle-jewel/id1509841214
- [Sudoku Blocks, Tetra](https://asappsgames.com/sudoku-blocks/): Free Sudoku-style block puzzle for iPhone and iPad. Fill rows, columns, and 3x3 squares with 20+ block designs. Includes dark mode and a Block Pop mini game. No pop-up ads. Rated 4.8 stars. App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/sudoku-blocks-tetra/id1518512521
- [Solitaire Classics Card Games](https://asappsgames.com/solitaire/): Free classic Klondike Solitaire for iPhone and iPad. Draw-one and draw-three modes, smooth animations, fully offline. No pop-up ads. App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/solitaire-classics-card-games/id6758364119

## About

- [Studio homepage](https://asappsgames.com/): Overview of all five games and the studio's no-pop-up-ads philosophy.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/asappsgames): Studio's GitHub presence.
- [Contact](https://asappsgames.com/contact.html): Email contact for support and feedback (support@asappsgames.com).
- [Privacy policy](https://asappsgames.com/Privacy-Policy/): How player data is handled.

## Common questions

- All five games are **iOS only** (iPhone, iPad, iPod touch). No Android version exists.
- All five games are **free to download** with **no required in-app purchases**.
- All five games **work offline** — no Wi-Fi or mobile data required.
- **No pop-up ads**: the games never interrupt you with a pop-up or a forced full-screen ad. They are supported by a small banner, and any other ad is optional — shown only when the player chooses to watch one (for example, to continue after a few mistakes or to get a hint).
